app.name: Phial
app.tagline: Write docs in HTML, powered by AI agents

home.noDocs: No documents in this workspace yet. Create one, start from an example below, or generate with AI in the editor.
home.llmMissing: No LLM configured (set LLM_API_KEY in .env, then restart the backend)
home.contextHint: Attach local folders (code, notes, …) to this document. When you chat with the AI about it, the folders' text files get read and spliced into the prompt — capped by total character count, skipping .git / node_modules / binaries.
home.contextEmpty: No folders bound yet. Click "Add folder" below to attach one.
home.contextAddPrompt: Enter an absolute path to a local folder (e.g. /Users/me/projects/foo):
home.contextMissing: folder is missing or has been moved

editor.confirmDeleteDir: Delete folder "{name}" and everything in it? This cannot be undone.

ai.title: AI assistant
ai.placeholder: Describe what you want, or how to change this document…
ai.previewNote: Below is the AI result; the preview now shows it. Click "Apply to document" to write and save.
ai.hintNew: New document — describe the content or interface you want.
ai.hintEdit: Based on the current document — tell the AI how to change it.
ai.stateCaptured: Interface state captured — will be sent with your next message
ai.pickElement: Click an element in the preview (press again or Esc to cancel)
ai.modeAgentTip: Agent · let the AI write or edit this document directly
ai.modeChatTip: Chat · talk about this document without changing it
ai.newChatConfirm: Start a new chat? The current history will be cleared.
ai.dragHeight: Drag up/down to resize the input
ai.chatModeNotice: Chat mode: the AI will only reply with text and won't touch the document. Switch back to Agent to edit.

settings.title: Settings · Agent
settings.agentHint: Use the built-in LLM API (configured in .env), or a local CLI agent you've installed (Claude Code / Codex / Gemini) — Phial runs it non-interactively in the workspace folder and takes back the HTML it prints.
settings.notInstalledWarn: `{bin}` was not found on PATH — generation will fail if you pick this.
settings.builtinModelNote: from LLM_MODEL_NAME in .env — change it there
settings.envHint: Merged into the CLI subprocess's environment (API key, custom gateway, default model, …).
settings.envBuiltinNote: Env vars only apply to CLI agents; the built-in API uses .env.
